description: Deterministic Parser fact accuracy cases, separate from the R63 robustness corpus.

cases.description: Existing PhotoWall seed with imports, async work, timers, state, nested UI, and local calls.
Existing V2/Builder seed with custom leaf components and a non-UI on() method.
Imports, decorators, components, and calls inside comments or strings are data, not facts.
Imported/global APIs must be kept while local receiver calls are excluded.
Repeated same-line UI expressions keep distinct declarations and correct nesting.
Default, named, aliased, namespace, multiline, and side-effect imports.
ArkTS lazy import derived from the vendored tree-sitter grammar corpus.
Optional struct method derived from the vendored tree-sitter grammar corpus.
Small real ArkUI page with nested sibling UI blocks and API-looking text inside strings.
Real V2 test entry with timer/router APIs and decorator-looking text in comments and strings.
Real V1 component with two builders, resource references, conditional UI, and local calls.
Real V2 component with complex receivers, optional chains, lifecycle methods, and custom UI.
Leaf component call-chain recovery, UI-owned attributes, exact symbols, and decorator span boundaries.
PageTransition and local CustomDialog UI contexts with uppercase business-call negatives.
Class declaration and Promise syntax coverage without UI or platform API false positives.
